hero.defaultDesc: We deliver AI, cloud and automation solutions to accelerate business outcomes and drive measurable value.

services.title: What We
services.subtitle: We design and deliver end-to-end digital transformation solutions.
services.aiMlDesc: Applied AI and ML solutions to automate decisions, personalize experiences and unlock new revenue streams.
services.cloudDesc: Cloud strategy, migration and managed services to build resilient, scalable platforms for modern apps.
services.dataDesc: Scalable data platforms and analytics pipelines that turn raw data into actionable business insight.
services.securityDesc: Comprehensive security services to protect data, secure applications and manage risk across your estate.
services.apiDesc: Connect platforms and workflows with secure APIs, integrations, and scalable orchestration.
services.mobileDesc: Modern web and mobile products with exceptional UX, scalable architecture and rapid delivery.
services.automationDesc: Streamline operations with workflow automation, RPA, and AI-driven process optimization.
services.itDesc: Resilient infrastructure, observability, and managed services to keep systems secure and fast.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: We design and deliver end-to-end digital transformation solutions—strategy, cloud, data, and automation—helping organizations modernize, scale, and achieve measurable business outcomes.
about.visionText: To empower businesses with digital capabilities that unlock new value, improve customer experiences, and create sustainable competitive advantage.
about.missionText: Deliver end-to-end transformation by combining strategy, engineering, and design—building trusted platforms and intelligent products that scale.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose
whyChoose.subtitle: We bring fresh perspectives, cutting-edge expertise, and unwavering commitment to transform your business.
whyChoose.expertDesc: Certified professionals with deep expertise in AI, cloud, data engineering, and digital transformation.
whyChoose.modernDesc: We leverage cutting-edge technologies and best practices to deliver scalable, future-proof solutions.
whyChoose.clientDesc: Dedicated partnership approach ensuring measurable business outcomes and ROI for every project.

aboutPage.title: About Tekvion
aboutPage.subtitle: We partner with organizations to design, build, and scale digital products and platforms that deliver measurable business impact.
aboutPage.executiveText: is a Dubai-based technology consulting and services company delivering high-impact solutions across IT infrastructure, cloud, cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and data-driven platforms. Licensed by the Department of Economy & Tourism – Dubai, Tekvion combines strategic consulting, digital transformation solution design and implementation, and managed services to help organizations modernize operations, secure digital assets, and turn technology into a measurable business advantage in line with the UAE government's mission for the IT sector.
aboutPage.visionText: To be the most trusted technology partner for growth—helping businesses use data, cloud, and automation to innovate faster, operate smarter, and deliver exceptional customer experiences.
aboutPage.missionText: We deliver end-to-end digital transformation by combining strategy, engineering, and design. From discovery to deployment, we build secure, scalable solutions that accelerate outcomes and create lasting value.

portfolioPage.title: Our Portfolio
portfolioPage.subtitle: Showcasing our work across AI, cloud, data, and cybersecurity solutions.
portfolioPage.project1Desc: End-to-end ML pipeline delivering real-time business intelligence for a leading UAE enterprise.
portfolioPage.project2Desc: Migrated legacy infrastructure to a cloud-native architecture, reducing costs by 40%.
portfolioPage.project3Desc: Built a scalable data lake processing petabytes of data for actionable insights across departments.
portfolioPage.project4Desc: Implemented comprehensive zero-trust security across multi-cloud environments for a financial institution.

compliancePage.title: Regulatory, Risks & Compliance
compliancePage.subtitle: We align our delivery and operations with leading regulatory frameworks, security guidelines, and risk management best practices—so your solutions stay secure, compliant, and fit for the UAE and global markets.
compliancePage.item1Title: Alignment with UAE Cyber Security Council Guidelines
compliancePage.item1Desc: Our solutions and practices align with the UAE Cyber Security Council's guidelines and national cybersecurity strategy, helping you meet local regulatory expectations and protect critical assets.
compliancePage.item2Desc: We design and implement architectures that respect data residency and sovereignty requirements, including UAE and regional mandates, so your data stays where it is required and remains compliant.
compliancePage.item3Title: Information Service Management Standards and Frameworks
compliancePage.item3Desc: We apply established standards and frameworks—such as ITIL, ISO 20000, and related ISM practices—to deliver consistent, measurable service quality and continuous improvement.
compliancePage.item4Desc: Structured vendor governance ensures third-party products and services are selected, monitored, and managed in line with your risk appetite and compliance obligations.
compliancePage.item5Desc: We embed IT risk management best practices across the lifecycle—from assessment and treatment to monitoring and reporting—so risks are identified, owned, and managed effectively.

valuePage.title: Value Proposition
valuePage.subtitle: We deliver IT solutions that are UAE-compliant, scalable, and risk-aware—so your business gains sustainable, long-term technology value.
valuePage.item1Desc: Our solutions are designed to meet UAE regulatory and governance requirements. We embed compliance and governance into delivery so your IT stays aligned with local standards and best practices.
valuePage.item2Title: Scalable services aligned with business outcomes
valuePage.item2Desc: We scale technology and services with your growth and objectives. From design to operations, our offerings are aligned with measurable business outcomes so you get results that matter.
valuePage.item3Title: Reduced operational, regulatory, and cybersecurity risk
valuePage.item3Desc: We help lower operational, regulatory, and cybersecurity risk through structured processes, security-by-design, and ongoing monitoring—so you can focus on growth with greater confidence.
valuePage.item4Desc: We build for the long term: architectures, practices, and partnerships that deliver sustained value, reduce waste, and keep your technology fit for the future.
